$comment: Free taster of Rosacea Beyond Redness. Three short lessons that teach the practitioner to see rosacea as a barrier-and-microbiome condition rather than a redness problem. Lesson 03 is the soft transition into the paid version.

parts.title: The taster
parts.body: What you'll get out of these three short lessons.

parts.title: Beneath the redness
parts.body: The four subtypes, the barrier story, and why anti-redness regimens miss the underlying condition.

parts.title: Where to go from here
parts.body: The full Rosacea Beyond Redness course, and how it picks up where this one ends.
